title: Button Group
description: Groups multiple buttons together with consistent styling and optional selection behavior. Supports color/look theming, disabled state, and click/selection events.

sections.title: Color
sections.description: Explore color variants using the color property.

sections.title: Look
sections.description: Explore look variants using the look property.

sections.title: Size
sections.description: Explore size options using utility classes like ax-sm, ax-md, ax-lg.

sections.title: Dropdown Items
sections.description: Show a button group with dropdown content inside group items.

sections.title: Splitted Buttons
sections.description: Display split-style buttons inside the group.

sections.title: Icon-only
sections.description: Showcase icon-only group items using ax-prefix and ax-icon.

sections.title: Selection Modes
sections.description: Demonstrate different selection behaviors: none, single, and multiple with pre-selected items and event handling.

sections.title: Per-item Overrides
sections.description: Show how individual items can override color while group look is enforced, demonstrating the inheritance hierarchy.

sections.title: Dividers
sections.description: Use the divided property to visually separate logical groups within the button group.

props.name: selection
props.description: Defines the selection mode for the group: 'single', 'multiple', or 'none'.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Whether the component is disabled. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: color
props.description: Defines the color scheme of the component. Inherited from MXColorComponent.

props.name: look
props.description: Defines the visual appearance style of the component. Inherited from MXLookComponent.

props.name: tabIndex
props.description: The tab index for keyboard navigation. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: touched
props.description: Indicates whether the component has been touched. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: id
props.description: Unique identifier for the component. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

events.name: onClick
events.description: Emitted when any button in the group is clicked.

events.name: onFocus
events.description: Emitted when the component receives focus. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: onBlur
events.description: Emitted when the component loses focus. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: disabledChange
events.description: Emitted when the disabled state changes. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: onOptionChanged
events.description: Fired when an option related to the component changes. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

events.name: colorChange
events.description: Emitted when the color property changes. Inherited from MXColorComponent.

events.name: lookChange
events.description: Emitted when the look property changes. Inherited from MXLookComponent.

events.name: selectionChange
events.description: Emitted when the selection mode changes.

events.name: selectedButtonChange
events.description: Emitted with the button item component instance when the selected button changes.

methods.content:
/**
 * Sets a component option with optional lifecycle callbacks.
 *
 * @param option - The option configuration containing the name, value and optional before/after callbacks.
 */
setOption<T = any>(option: MXComponentSetOption<T>)

/**
 * Registers a callback function to be called when the component is touched.
 *
 * @param fn - The callback function to register.
 */
registerOnTouched(fn: () => void): void

/**
 * Sets the disabled state of the component.
 *
 * @param isDisabled - Whether the component should be disabled.
 */
setDisabledState(isDisabled: boolean): void

/**
 * Checks if the component is focused or has any focused element.
 *
 * @returns boolean - True if the component has focus.
 */
hasFocus(): boolean

/**
 * Removes focus from the component.
 */
blur(): void

/**
 * Gets the host HTML element of the component.
 *
 * @returns T - The native DOM element associated with this component.
 */
getHostElement<T = HTMLElement>(): T

props.name: text
props.description: Text displayed on the button item.

props.name: selected
props.description: Indicates whether the item is selected.

props.name: divided
props.description: Visually separates the item from adjacent items.

props.name: data
props.description: Arbitrary data associated with the item.

props.name: name
props.description: The name identifier of the item.

props.name: color
props.description: Defines the color scheme of the item. Inherited from MXColorComponent.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Whether the item is disabled. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: tabIndex
props.description: The tab index for keyboard navigation. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: touched
props.description: Indicates whether the component has been touched. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: id
props.description: Unique identifier for the component. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

events.name: onClick
events.description: Emitted when the item is clicked.

events.name: onFocus
events.description: Emitted when the item receives focus. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: onBlur
events.description: Emitted when the item loses focus. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: disabledChange
events.description: Emitted when the disabled state changes. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: onOptionChanged
events.description: Fired when an option related to the component changes. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

events.name: selectedChange
events.description: Emitted when the selected state changes.

methods.content:
/**
 * Sets a component option with optional lifecycle callbacks.
 *
 * @param option - The option configuration containing the name, value and optional before/after callbacks.
 */
setOption<T = any>(option: MXComponentSetOption<T>)

/**
 * Registers a callback function to be called when the component is touched.
 *
 * @param fn - The callback function to register.
 */
registerOnTouched(fn: () => void): void

/**
 * Sets the disabled state of the component.
 *
 * @param isDisabled - Whether the component should be disabled.
 */
setDisabledState(isDisabled: boolean): void

/**
 * Checks if the component is focused or has any focused element.
 *
 * @returns boolean - True if the component has focus.
 */
hasFocus(): boolean

/**
 * Removes focus from the component.
 */
blur(): void

/**
 * Gets the host HTML element of the component.
 *
 * @returns T - The native DOM element associated with this component.
 */
getHostElement<T = HTMLElement>(): T
